transcript.text:
Hello everyone, It's DJ G-Park
Park Myung Soo
Going live at your station on a Monday morning
I have a very special guest today
It's someone you guys really really have been dying to see
[3 hours ago]
Hello? Are you awake?
Are you going to a radio show today?
Yes I am
I'm going with you today
Really?
I'm your manager for today
Why are you a manager?
You are a long-time celebrity
[Celebrity for 16 years] Yeah, I've been a little skeptical about it
I have a lot of thoughts right now

[Kwon Jae Kwan is her manager for today]
What is this!? Wow
I got some snack for the ride
There's triangle kimbap too Thank you
How do you do a radio show?
[He is very experienced with radio talk shows]
I've never watched a radio before
You don't watch the radio People tend to listen to it
Your DJ is Park Myung Soo He's a veteran
You will have no problem at all
For the radio to be right, the timing has...
Are you listening? Yes
Oh okay
[Talking about radio shows]
Are you listening? Yes I am!
How did you know I love this apple drink?

I did my research
There's this guy that keeps leaving me hateful comments
Everyday? Yeah
A short text costs 50 Won and a long text costs 100 Won
It's a pay-to-text system
And this person is spending money to bash me
What did he say? I don't even remember
Saying stuff like "You never make me laugh"
I'm a comedian though
He kept attacking me
Also kept saying "I change the channel when you come out on the TV"
I don't even come out that often
I barely come out and he changes the channel
How many times do I come out?
We were texting back and forth and I got really mad 1 time
I have a RC car YouTube channel, right?

Can you just put this on your lap?
I won't ask any other questions Just use this as your table
This is actually why I'm here today
I'm so desperate
How do I open this?
Are you listening? Yes
Do you never offer food to the person next to you?
Is that your life philosophy?
Who the hell would want to be your manager then?
I didn't just buy your snacks I bought mine too!
I was wondering when you would offer me some We're here already
It'll be gone by the time we get there
[There we see the building]
[We have arrived, Tzu-star]
Let's go~!
I saw the video you posted with Park Myung Soo He was just saying what he wanted there

That's going to go on for 1 hour today
Hello
I brought Tzuyang today Why?
She said it's her first time here
Is she your girlfriend?
I have a wife and 2 kids
Oh, sorry
Come on the show together
Just sit there? No, talk too
Tzuyang needs to be in the spotlight
She will be, but you can be on the side
You can if you want Really?
Okay then
Hello everyone, it's DJ G-Park
Park Myung Soo
We have Tzuyang here today She is the goddess of mukbang

She is really pretty and kind
I was next to her and wondered
Why does she need to eat this much?
I had a lot of questions, but I couldn't ask because that show was Yoo Jae Suk's
You need to worry about your own intestines
Be quiet, hyung
Is this Park Myung Soo's Radio Show?
Stop it now
This isn't "Hangout with Yoo" This show is mine, I'm going to do whatever I want!
We are with Tzuyang Let's find out everything about her today
Give me the pizza coupons
He wants pizza coupons [She has 597 of them]
You need to interpret everything for her Yes sir
Her job is "mukbang creator"
It's Tzu-Tzuyang
Hello nice to meet you

Mukbang goddess Tzuyang
And next to her, People are wondering why his hat is so small
They're talking about you
Please introduce yourself
Nice to meet you I'm a comedian, Kwon Jae Kwan
But today, I am here as Tzuyang's manager
Tbh, there was no reason for you to come here Why are you here?
I escorted her in
And showed her around
And I also told her a lot about you
Do you know me really well?
Well according to the rumors,
Can I say it here?
Oh sorry
First time on a radio show, right?
This is going out to everyone in South Korea

Please introduce yourself to the listeners
Hello, I'm a mukbang creator Tzuyang
I eat a lot to entertain people
We've met on Hangout With Yoo
I saw you and saw that
You are such a beautiful lady
I'm not that beautiful
Aren't you almost like a kpop idol?
No way
You've seen me enough to know it
She was eating 4 chickens on that show
I watched her eat everything
And I thought to myself "Why is she doing that to herself?"
Can I talk about when she was eating noodles?
She eats like 15 packs a day
Were you surprised Absolutely

She said she was still hungry after that
It wasn't like that
Didn't you end up eating 20 packs?
The most I ate was 20 packs of Ramyun noodles
Let me ask you this, Why are you doing that?
That's how much a class of elementary kids eat
I just think to myself "just 1 more pack, just 1 more"
And ended up with 20 in the end
Well then,
Since it's a live show, people can't say that you spit it out or throw it back up, right?
Did you make any mistakes on your show so far?
[Expected question: Did you make any mistakes on your stream?]
I'm not sure if I can talk about this, but It's alcohol
It has to be really detailed to be funny
I drink alcohol on special occasions
So I was drinking on my stream

And I got drunk
And fell asleep without turning off the stream
Fell asleep on your show?
How much do you drink before you pass out?
People think I can drink like a whole box
But I can drink maybe 2~3 bottles of soju
That's not little at all
"2~3 bottles" means 3 bottles
She's trying to make herself look naive
So when it's 2~3 bottles, it's the bigger number
It depends on how I feel Okay, then let's say it's 2.5 bottles
No, let's do 0.5 bottle to 3 bottles
When she got drunk, her fans wanted to protect her
So the fans reported and asked the supervisors to turn off her show
That's very nice
Kids eat a lot because they're growing up

I have a daughter myself
But when she suddenly eats 4 bowls of rice,
I have no choice but to scold her
Are you out of your mind!?
If she eats 2 large pizza pies
Is something going on? Are you okay?
Do your parents say that too? Yes
Food expenses are outrageous for me too
I am sorry about this to this day, but
I couldn't control my eating habits, so I took my mom's credit card and overspent it
Like from bakeries to markets Way too much food
How much bread did you buy?
I bought and ate like 2 cakes
Did you blow out the candles? No I did not
I don't know about that question man
Hey, they could be curious too Okay

[Before she started to stream] I did eat a lot in 1 sitting I just continued eating small bits
Like 10 meals a day
That's crazy
Do you usually eat that much? Yes
How much rib eye do you eat?
You can't eat that much, right? No
I can eat like 3kg
3kgs? How many servings is that?
Isn't like 200 gram 1 serving?
I think it can be like 15 servings Alone!?
Can you eat all of that from the grill? Yes
Can you eat it all if I buy you? Yes, I love it
I shouldn't have said that
I saw her do a mukbang on a scale
She did an experiment to eat 3kg of food to see if she gains 3kg
So what happened?

She did gain 3kg It just transfered
4kg total because of the beverage
I was so shocked
Do you get sick of any food?
Not because it doesn't taste good
Just from eating too much
240 pieces of sushi
100 deep-fried cheese balls were very greasy as well
I'm just speechless
That's amazing
Do you have a long-term goal? Like you want to compete in mukbang?
I don't really have a goal with what I do
I just want to be around for a long time
You're in front of the person that's been around for way too long
"I don't need to be the greatest, I just don't want to stick around"
Right, I want to do it for a long time

Just eat a lot of food for a very long time
You came out on our radio show
Tell us about your time here
I had so much fun today
A lot of people are worried about my health because of the content I do
That's what everyone worries about
I'm controlling myself very well
So don't you worry!
I will continue to do my best, thank you
Thank you once again, We would like to see you well and healthy in mukbangs
Jae Kwan too, We will invite you again when you get a new talent
I don't think I can come out again then
Thank you!
[Thanks to my subscribers]
[I get to try and experience new things]
[and eat delicious foods. Thank you!]

[With better mukbang]
[With even more delicious mukbang]
[I will be with you guys for a long time]
[Let's stick around together]
The show was very fun!
It went very smooth
I am her manager for today
Can you wave this way?
Look this way, please This way too!
[Very first and exciting radio experience!]
It's embarrassing, right?
I was so surprised
Manager oppa..?
I will snatch your hair
Manager hyung
You did a good job today, I'll buy you food

Thank you
Thank you
Thank you
So good
You can have some dumplings Thank you!
She gave me permission to eat the dumplings
This place is really delicious
[Telling her about some other restaurant]
Their kimchi stew is amazing
[Sounds delicious..]
I took a lot of my managers there
They all said it was their #1 kimchi stew
Do they give you a lot of meat? Yes
Hurry up and search it up
Let's drop off Tzuyang and go there without her
Without me?

You're gonna eat again!?
They're going to eat yummy food without me..
I'm not even surprised anymore
Thank you for coming early in the morning
I had a good time too
Also giving me useful advice for the radio show
Nah I got to be on the show too thanks to you
I got to eat snacks too
Just be my manager full-time
No thanks
I'm going to treat my manager better now
[Later that day, texting Mr. Kwon] It tastes amazing!
[This place was delicious]
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
